features.name: Home / Daily Dashboard
features.summary: Your day at a glance: steps, calories, sleep, energy, water and workouts, plus the animated 24-hour Daily Aura.

features.name: Apple Health tracking
features.summary: Continuous read of HealthKit (steps, heart rate, HRV, energy, sleep, VO2max, workouts) with optional write-back.

features.name: XP & Leveling
features.summary: Earn XP for actions; progress through shield tiers from Wood to Legendary.

features.name: Daily Quests
features.summary: Small daily and weekly tasks that award XP and keep you moving.

features.name: Learning Spark
features.summary: Complete an online course and verify the certificate on-device for a large XP reward.

features.name: Outdoor Run (GPS)
features.summary: GPS running with a 3D map, chase camera, live stats, and interactive route replay.

features.name: Smart Water Tracking
features.summary: Hydration goals and reminders that adapt to activity, climate, and time of day.

features.name: Progress Photos
features.summary: Before/after body-transformation tracking with weight, notes, and side-by-side compare.

features.name: Weekly Report
features.summary: A 7-day vs. prior-week summary with a 0-100 score, charts, and a shareable card.

features.name: Apple Watch app & Widgets
features.summary: Live activity rings, preset workouts, real-time heart rate, quick Captain check-in, and home/watch widgets.

features.name: Captain Hamoudi chat
features.summary: The AI coach: a personality-driven chat with memory, bio-context, structured workout/meal cards, and quick replies.

features.name: Captain memory
features.summary: The Captain remembers your goals, body, preferences, and history — about 200 facts on Max, 500 on Pro.

features.name: Captain voice (TTS)
features.summary: Spoken replies via cloud premium voice with an on-device fallback. Consent-gated.

features.name: Kitchen
features.summary: Photograph your fridge and get a 3- or 7-day meal plan from your ingredients, with macros and a shopping list.

features.name: Gym & workouts
features.summary: Captain-generated plans, a live session screen, Zone-2 hands-free voice coaching, and a post-workout summary.

features.name: Sleep (Smart Wake + analysis)
features.summary: Sleep tracking, Smart Wake windows from 90-minute cycles, and on-device sleep analysis with a morning briefing.

features.name: Battle / QuestKit Arena
features.summary: A competitive ladder of 10 stages x 5 challenges that unlock sequentially.

features.name: Peaks (view-only)
features.summary: Browse the Legendary Challenges on Max; starting one requires Pro.

features.name: Peaks / Legendary Challenges (full)
features.summary: Real 4-16 week periodized record programs: Engine Test, a weekly-adapting AI plan, and a weekly review with the Captain.

features.name: My Vibe / DJ Hamoudi
features.summary: Spotify-powered music that adapts to your biometric state and the time of day.

features.name: Advanced intelligence
features.summary: The advanced AI model, extended memory, premium voice, weekly insight narratives, and multi-week plans.

features.name: Photo / form analysis
features.summary: Analyze body or exercise-form photos for tailored guidance.

features.name: Directives
features.summary: Teach the Captain a standing rule once and he executes it automatically forever.

features.name: Tribe / Arena
features.summary: A small private social layer (max 5 members) with shared missions and sparks. Built but NOT yet live (feature-flagged off).
